content: The extraction stage will include durable knowledge filtering, memory packet schema, automatic topic clustering, and structured outputs from Llama.
The prompt must enforce a strict schema like 'conversation_id': ..., 'text': ..., 'entities': ... to produce structured durable knowledge.
The system will use local Ollama + Llama 3.1 model as the default LLM backend, with a modular adapter layer allowing integration with other LLM providers.
Pipeline: Conversation ingestion -> Memory extraction engine -> LLM call -> Parse structured output -> Store memory packets.

topic: JSON-safe Extraction Fix for Llama Model
content: Small 8B models often produce slightly broken JSON, and fixing this now will save debugging later.
The next module will make the system actually useful: Semantic Memory Retrieval enables generating context prompts that work in any AI assistant.
